dashboard.heroTitle: Build, refine, and ship stronger resumes faster, {{name}}
dashboard.heroSubtitle: This dashboard combines resume drafting, uploads, premium tools, and quick account visibility so you can move from idea to polished document without extra clicks.
dashboard.planActive: Premium tools are active on your workspace.
dashboard.planFreeHint: Upgrade to unlock premium templates and full AI analysis.
dashboard.cardCreateBody: Open a clean resume and shape the structure from scratch with the builder.
dashboard.cardUploadBody: Bring in your current resume and continue editing it inside the workspace.
dashboard.cardTemplatesBodyUnlocked: Premium templates are available. Pick a stronger visual direction for your next version.
dashboard.cardTemplatesBodyLocked: Unlock premium layouts and more polished visuals from the subscription page.
dashboard.continueFallback: Your latest draft is ready for editing, polishing, and export.
dashboard.nextBestActionExisting: Refresh your strongest resume, run analysis, and export the improved version.
dashboard.nextBestActionNew: Create your first draft to unlock the full resume workflow and preview tools.
dashboard.librarySubtitle: Keep multiple versions for different roles, experiment with templates, and return to any draft later.
dashboard.emptyTitle: Your workspace is ready for the first resume
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Create a new draft or upload an existing PDF to start building inside the editor.
dashboard.resumeFallback: Draft ready for editing and further refinement.
dashboard.modalCreateSubtitle: Name your draft clearly so it's easy to find when you start creating multiple versions.
dashboard.modalUploadSubtitle: Add a title and attach a PDF to create a new editable draft in your workspace.
dashboard.fileSelected: File selected and ready for upload.
dashboard.dropzoneHint: PDF format works best for the current import flow.

builder.downloadError: Failed to download the resume. Please try again.

payment.success.title: Payment successful

payment.success.failedSubtitle: Try again or choose another payment method.
